# Conservation of momentum

## Short Teaching Summary
Conservation of momentum: When mass is not constant (like a bottle rocket), you can only look at changes in momentum, not separate changes in mass and velocity. Map connection: this idea links by common_mistake_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.

## Difficulty
0.50

- None recorded.

## Related Concepts
- Newton's laws of motion (common_mistake_for)

## Misconceptions
- When mass is not constant (like a bottle rocket), you can only look at changes in momentum, not separate changes in mass and velocity.
